title: 負けられない戦いが、あるのデス

text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm working in my office...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I can't go losin' today's match!

Looks like Taiki Shuttle is pumping herself up.
Although I don't remember having any races
scheduled for today...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This one decides it all... I'd go so far as to call it
my final showdown.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Trainer—you're comin' too! I want ya to
witness my moment of glory!

I find myself being taken somewhere I never could
have imagined...

text_block_list.name: Rodeo Lady
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the local rodeo competition, y'all!
Let's saddle up for some ridin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yessiree! It's the day we've all been watin' for!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But only one person can take home all the glory!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Aww... I couldn't make it more than five seconds...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: This is one tricky challenge!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If only I could have held on for just a minute
longer, those ten kilos of steak would've been
mine...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I really wanted to eat it too...

Sounds like there's a grand-prize of ten kilograms
of steak to be won.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whew... I'm gettin' the shivers.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My family back home used to say, "Only a real
cowgirl knows how to handle a buckin' bull."

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Don't matter if it's real or mechanical!
choice_data_list: You're really putting your all in this.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You bet I am! When I'm in this getup, you can be
sure I mean business!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I know the real way to get a wild bull to behave.
I'll stake my pride on it!

text_block_list.name: Rodeo Lady
text_block_list.text:
All right, y'all! Next up is contestant number
nine—Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's right! The name's Taiki Shuttle, and I'm a
real cowgirl!

Taiki strides confidently over to the mechanical
bull.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeehaw! Time for this cowgirl to show y'all how
it's done!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Looks like I'm the champ!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She rode that bull like it was second nature...
Guess the steak prize is going to her!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Wow! You were awesome out there!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Thanks for the support, y'all. That goes
for you too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Rodeo Lady
text_block_list.text:
Here are your ten kilograms of steak! Don't forget
to take all this home with you, okay?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank ya! I was so wrapped up in the rodeo, I
forgot there even was a prize!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but do you have a second?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You were amazing. The way you held on no
matter what. And how you handled those sudden
turns too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'd like you to give me some advice. How can I get
to your level?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! Well, lemme give it a think...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you've figured it out, Trainer! Why don't ya tell her for me?
choice_data_list: You need to be obsessed with food.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So that's what it is—appetite. A spirit that
hungers for food. Maybe I should have given up
steak before the rodeo for motivation.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yep, appetite is key! I reckon I'd do just about
anything for a juicy bit of steak...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! Don't go thinkin' I'm some kind of a
glutton or something!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you sonuvagun! I can get mad too, ya
know!

After that, Taiki Shuttle teaches Oguri Cap the
secrets to bull riding.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You know it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Bein' a cowgirl means having the guts to represent
my entire hometown! That's where my power
comes from!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I understand that feeling very well. Thank you. I
should probably put in more work.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haha! That's the spirit, Oguri!

Taiki Shuttle says her goodbyes to Oguri Cap,
happy and content.
